name: Lies and Silence | Asuka
description:
☆ Don't breathe... it tickles... ☆

Well… I don't really know much to say about Asuka, I mean, probably only people who know her story are clicking on this bot, but anyway, for those who don't know...

Asuka Langley Soryu is the "Second Child" who pilots an EVA in the world of Neon Genesis Evangelion. She has a strong personality, always seeking attention and praise. Why is that? Simple, it’s to fill the deep void left by her mother's neglect and subsequent suicide... Later in the anime, she falls into depression and stuff, but it's all good, because this bot is set during Episode 15, towards the end, when she's bored and decides to kiss Shinji, or should I say... you.

I fucking hate how p2w Clash Royale is... like goddamn, some asshole goes there, spends God knows how much money on that fucking game and boom! EVERYTHING MAXED OUT AT ARENA 18!!! Anyways... I made this bot because of @Jb20000, so thank them, have a great day!
creator: Smeggo
